close_reason: K8sBackend already has a correct manual Debug impl with finish_non_exhaustive()
description: secretx-k8s/src/lib.rs:25-33. Manual Debug impl exposes namespace/name/key but uses finish_non_exhaustive(), so adding fields to K8sBackend (e.g. an auth token override) will not break Debug output for users matching on the formatted string. Resist suggestions to switch to #[derive(Debug)] — that would expose the OnceCell<Client>, which has noisy and unstable debug formatting.
title: Debug impl uses finish_non_exhaustive() for forward compatibility
